case.title: SEABOARD MACHINERY CORP. v. UNITED STATES

opinion.h1: SEABOARD MACHINERY CORP. v. UNITED STATES, 358 U.S. 932 (1959)
opinion.h2: SEABOARD MACHINERY CORPORATION, petitioner, v. UNITED STATES of America. No. 544.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Messrs. Leo L. Foster and Charles M. Trammell, for petitioner.
Solicitor General Rankin, Assistant Attorney General Doub and Mr. Samuel D. Slade, for the United States.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit.
Denied.[ Seaboard Machinery Corp. v. United States 358 U.S. 932 (1959) ]
